urdu transliteration text:
Hal Min Naasareen Yan Sur Naa
Amma Haye Amma
Mother O’ Mother
english translation text: Is there anyone to help me?

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text: Nazdeek aa raha hu, Wada nibharaha hu, Amma mujhe sambhalo
english translation text: I am coming close, I am fulfilling my promise, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar nahi hai ghazi, darya pe sogaya hai
Raah-e-khuda may sara, kunba ujjar gaya hai
Be aas hogaya hu(n)
I am without any support
english translation text:
Akbar is no longer here, my warrior sleeps on the river bank
In the path of God, my entire family has been destroyed

urdu transliteration text:
Tanha may rehgaya hu(n)
Amma mujhe sambhaalo
I am left all alone
Mother support me
Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Awaaz dasht may jab, hal min ki de raha tha
Abbas-e-bawafa ka, lasha tarap raha tha
My loyal Abbas’s body trembled
english translation text: When I raised my voice in the desert calling “Hal Min”

urdu transliteration text:
Maqtal may aa raha hu(n)
Tumko bula raha hu(n)
Amma mujhe sambhaalo
Mother support me
english translation text:
I am coming to the battlefield
Calling out to you

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Duba huwa lahu may, ye dasht-e-Karbala hai
Chehre pe khoon-e-Asghar, mene yuhi(n) mala hai
english translation text:
This land of Karbala, is drenched in blood
I have covered my face with Asghar’s blood

urdu transliteration text:
Kis haal mei hai amma
Pyaasa ye laal tera
Amma mujhe sambhaalo
Mother support me
english translation text:
What is the state O Mother
Of this thirsty son of yours

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Zakhmo(n) se mera amma, tan chur hogaya hai
Lashe utha utha ke, dil gham se bhar gaya hai
english translation text:
O Mother , my body is crushed by the wounds
Carrying the bodies has filled my heart with sorrow

urdu transliteration text:
Charo(n) taraf hai hamlaa
Talwar ki tabar ka
Amma mujhe sambhalo
Mother support me
english translation text:
The attack is from all four corners
Of Swords and axes

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Aankho(n) ke saamne hay, har bachpane ka manzar
Lori suna rahay the, zanu(n) pe tum sulaakar
english translation text:
Before my eyes are visions of my childhood
You, putting me to sleep on your lap, singing a lullaby

urdu transliteration text:
Ab haal aake dekho
Godi may mujhko lelo
Amma mujhe sambhalo
Come and see my state now
Mother support me
english translation text: Take me in your lap

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Lut jayengi ridaaey(n), khayme bhi ab jalenge
Pyaari meri Sakina, ke baliyaa(n) chinenge
english translation text:
The cloaks will be looted, tents will be burned
My beloved Sakina’s earrings will be snatched

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam-e-gharibaa(n) mei tab
Hogi sada-e-Zainab
Amma mujhe sambhaalo
Zainab’s call will be
Mother support me
english translation text: In Sham-e-Ghariba then

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Amma badan ye sara, teero(n) se ab bhara hai
Ghore pe na zamee(n) par, lasha mera para hai
english translation text:
O Mother this body is pierced full of arrows
My body is laying neither on the horse nor the ground

urdu transliteration text:
Ab shimr ki churi hay
Gardan pe chal rahi hay
Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text:
Now it’s Shimr’s dagger
Cutting my throat
Mother support me

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Sajde mei mera sar hai, talwaar chal rahi hay
Khayme ke dar pe Zainab, bechain ho rahi hay
english translation text:
The sword is cutting my head, I am in sajda,
Zainab is restless on the door of the tent

urdu transliteration text:
Tuttegi ab qayamat
Nazdeek hay shahadat
Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text:
Qiyamat will arrive now
Martyrdom is close
Mother support me

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
kaise likhe "Tejani", purdard ka wo manzar
jab shimr ne chalaya, ibne ali pe khanjar
english translation text:
How will Tejani script, that pain filled scene
When shimr stabbed(continuously) son of Ali with the sword

urdu transliteration text:
awaaz thi fiza may,
haaye dasht-e-karbala may
amma mujhe sambhalo
Mother support me
english translation text:
A voice rose in the sky
in the desert of Karbala

urdu transliteration text: Sine se ab lagalo Aghosh me chuupalo Amma mujhe sambhaalo
english translation text: Hold me to your chest, hide me in your bosom, Mother support me

urdu transliteration text:
Amma mujhe sambhalo
Mother support me
